reviews.comment:
Muy copada la estación de servicio. Limpia y cómoda para un refrigerio en la ruta.

(Translated by Google)
The service station is very busy. Clean and convenient for a snack on the road.

reviews.comment:
Compre 6 empanadas sin tacc $  2.600. un robo ! . Parece que el lugar está licitado.... Tristísimo que un ACA tenga tan mal servicio y tan caro. Por eso será que no hay nadie cenando !!!!!

(Translated by Google)
I bought 6 gluten-free empanadas for $2,600. A rip-off! It seems like the place is being auctioned off... It's so sad that an ACA (Argentine Automobile Club) has such bad service and is so expensive. That's probably why nobody's eating there!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURodnVQQ3FRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Fui a hacer un tramite personal y el jefe del ACA de nombre Martin Diaz, con mucha predisposicion y atención, me resolvió el tramite de manera eficiente y de muy buena manera, luego fuimos a tomar un café y la atención del lugar fue muy buena.

(Translated by Google)
I went to do a personal transaction, and the ACA manager, Martin Diaz, was very helpful and attentive. He handled the process efficiently and in a very friendly manner. Then we went for coffee, and the service was excellent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURoOXM3TU9BEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buen lugar para parar en viaje, tranquilo cómodo y limpio, con lugares al aire libre para sentarse y juegos. Muy buena atención del personal. Precios razonables.

(Translated by Google)
A great place to stop on your trip. Quiet, comfortable, and clean, with outdoor seating and games. The staff was very attentive. Reasonable prices.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURobHUtVzZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Para informarme sobre los servicios el administrativo Martin Diaz nos atendió excelente habiendo estado realizando otras cosas y nos asocio y aplicó  promociones se comunicó  con bs as para que  se aseguren de aplicar los beneficios. MUY BIEN 10

(Translated by Google)
To inquire about the services, the administrator, Martin Diaz, provided excellent service despite being busy with other tasks. He helped us sign up for a membership and applied promotions, even contacting the Buenos Aires office to ensure the benefits were applied. VERY GOOD 10
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURobXNUNG93RRAB
